title: [FIRRTLtoHW] Lower to Concurrent assert
body:
`firrtl` verification statements (`assert,cover,assume`) are being lowered to `sv` dialect by adding an `always` block
For example, `firrtl.assert %clock, %aCond, %aEn, ` ,  is lowered to:
```
sv.always posedge %clock {
   sv.if %aEn {
      sv.assert  %aCond : i1
   }
```
Update the `LowerToHW` to use concurrent assert instead of enclosing `always` block to immediate asserts.
`firrtl.assert %clock, %aCond, %aEn, `  ==>
```
%1 = comb.and %aEn, %aCond : i1
sv.assert.concurrent posedge %clock %1
```
